MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAH, JIGNESH SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-10-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, JIGNESH SHAH SHALL HAVE POSSESSION OF 1353 BUSH STREET, ROOM 210, JAMES COURT HOTEL BY 4-15-95, 12 NOON. IF DEFENDANT, RAYMOND DEVEAUX SO VACATES, PLAINTIFF, JIGNESH SHAW SHALL WAIVE ALL RENTS, DAMAGES AND COSTS ARISING OUT OF THIS ACTION AND DISMISS THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE. A GOODWILL PAYMENT OF $200 SHALL BE PAID TO RAYMOND DEVEAUX IF HE LEAVES BY 4-15-95, 12 NOON. ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS OF THIS AMOUNT HAS BEEN PAID TO RAYMOND DEVEAUX AS OF 4-4-95. IF DEFENDANT, RAYMOND DEVEAUX DOES NOT VACATE THE PREMISES AT 1353 BUSH, #210 BY 4-15-95, 12 NOON, PLAINTIFF JIGNESH SHAW SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RENT OF $375, DAMAGES OF $17.86 PER DAY FROM FEBRUARY 28, 1995 TO AND INCLUDING THE DATE OF JUDGMENT, REIMBURSEMENT OF THE GOOD WILL MONEY IN THE AMOUNT OF $200 AND COSTS OF SUIT. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE.
